title: bumelia lucida
intro: Bumelia lucida, also known as the shining fringe tree, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bumelia lucida include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, and promote wound healing. Bumelia lucida can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
